records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it dead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it dead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Orca says she only stepped back for a moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Orca says she only stepped back for a moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Orca says she only stepped back for a moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a tough one. All those slimy tentacles...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a tough one. All those slimy tentacles...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a tough one. All those slimy tentacles...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Orca, while you were handling Kraken, things were rough on our end too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Orca, while you were handling Kraken, things were rough on our end too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Orca, while you were handling Kraken, things were rough on our end too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As if the C.O.s crawling up the deck weren't enough, creatures we only see on land started leaping out of the sea...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As if the C.O.s crawling up the deck weren't enough, creatures we only see on land started leaping out of the sea...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As if the C.O.s crawling up the deck weren't enough, creatures we only see on land started leaping out of the sea...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which shows how serious this whole situation is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which shows how serious this whole situation is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which shows how serious this whole situation is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Check your Eternium shields.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Check your Eternium shields.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Check your Eternium shields.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ordinary people like us can't endure fast-rising CSE levels for long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ordinary people like us can't endure fast-rising CSE levels for long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ordinary people like us can't endure fast-rising CSE levels for long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Current CSE level is 4.2...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Current CSE level is 4.2...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Current CSE level is 4.2...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not sure how long the shields will last.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not sure how long the shields will last.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not sure how long the shields will last.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two should head back first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two should head back first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two should head back first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Orca says it'll only get more dangerous the closer she gets to the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Orca says it'll only get more dangerous the closer she gets to the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Orca says it'll only get more dangerous the closer she gets to the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Orca, it's just as dangerous for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Orca, it's just as dangerous for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Orca, it's just as dangerous for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take care of ourselves. Just focus on not getting seriously hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take care of ourselves. Just focus on not getting seriously hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take care of ourselves. Just focus on not getting seriously hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Make it back safely and I'll let you eat nothing but marshmallows for three days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Make it back safely and I'll let you eat nothing but marshmallows for three days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Make it back safely and I'll let you eat nothing but marshmallows for three days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-oh...! Marshmallows...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-oh...! Marshmallows...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-oh...! Marshmallows...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard there are many ways to hunt a C.O...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard there are many ways to hunt a C.O...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard there are many ways to hunt a C.O...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this... is closer to a predator's hunt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this... is closer to a predator's hunt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this... is closer to a predator's hunt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are still lots of C.O.s on the island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are still lots of C.O.s on the island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are still lots of C.O.s on the island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need to hurry...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need to hurry...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need to hurry...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! They just keep coming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! They just keep coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! They just keep coming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to someone taking care of the tentacles over there, at least that's one problem gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to someone taking care of the tentacles over there, at least that's one problem gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to someone taking care of the tentacles over there, at least that's one problem gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the ones climbing up here, you can handle them, Miss Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the ones climbing up here, you can handle them, Miss Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the ones climbing up here, you can handle them, Miss Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, I can't stop the ones outside my range.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, I can't stop the ones outside my range.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, I can't stop the ones outside my range.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless shells were bursting where my hands can't reach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless shells were bursting where my hands can't reach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless shells were bursting where my hands can't reach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like... over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like... over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like... over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those cannon blasts... I know that sound...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those cannon blasts... I know that sound...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those cannon blasts... I know that sound...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! We spotted a C.O. landing on the shore!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! We spotted a C.O. landing on the shore!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! We spotted a C.O. landing on the shore!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As per the grand tradition of the Sharks Pirates, we fired the cannon ahead of time, taking action first and reporting later!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As per the grand tradition of the Sharks Pirates, we fired the cannon ahead of time, taking action first and reporting later!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As per the grand tradition of the Sharks Pirates, we fired the cannon ahead of time, taking action first and reporting later!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Sharks never had such a tradition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Sharks never had such a tradition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Sharks never had such a tradition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that the kid you mentioned?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that the kid you mentioned?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that the kid you mentioned?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dracasia! You can't be here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dracasia! You can't be here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dracasia! You can't be here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're too far! I can't hear you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're too far! I can't hear you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're too far! I can't hear you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No idea what she's saying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No idea what she's saying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No idea what she's saying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kahaha! Whatever. Let's just dock first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kahaha! Whatever. Let's just dock first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kahaha! Whatever. Let's just dock first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's probably yelling something like "thank you" or whatever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's probably yelling something like "thank you" or whatever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's probably yelling something like "thank you" or whatever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera's really angry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera's really angry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera's really angry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said she'll sink the ship the moment they arrive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said she'll sink the ship the moment they arrive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said she'll sink the ship the moment they arrive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is she here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is she here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is she here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-aaah! Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-aaah! Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-aaah! Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who fired that cannon at my face, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one who fired that cannon at my face, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one who fired that cannon at my face, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough!* N-no...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough!* N-no...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough!* N-no...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I-I was just firing at the C.O.
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I-I was just firing at the C.O.
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I-I was just firing at the C.O.
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, look! A ship!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, look! A ship!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, look! A ship!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that the group we saw earlier cutting off a Kraken tentacle?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that the group we saw earlier cutting off a Kraken tentacle?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that the group we saw earlier cutting off a Kraken tentacle?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please let me go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please let me go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please let me go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, so annoying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, so annoying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, so annoying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Count yourself lucky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Count yourself lucky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Count yourself lucky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! A real pirate doesn't bow down to threats!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! A real pirate doesn't bow down to threats!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! A real pirate doesn't bow down to threats!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you little...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you little...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you little...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tallie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tallie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tallie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this voice...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this voice...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this voice...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We shouldn't be fighting among ourselves in a situation like this, should we?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We shouldn't be fighting among ourselves in a situation like this, should we?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We shouldn't be fighting among ourselves in a situation like this, should we?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Auntie Mary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Auntie Mary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Auntie Mary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, yes. Mary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, yes. Mary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, yes. Mary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That name feels familiar to me now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That name feels familiar to me now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That name feels familiar to me now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how... have you been all this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-how... have you been all this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-how... have you been all this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the whole world in turmoil, did you think I'd just lie around quietly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the whole world in turmoil, did you think I'd just lie around quietly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the whole world in turmoil, did you think I'd just lie around quietly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you hurt anywhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I may be weaker than before, but I'm still the one who trained you as a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I may be weaker than before, but I'm still the one who trained you as a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I may be weaker than before, but I'm still the one who trained you as a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A sea like this is nothing more than a stroll for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A sea like this is nothing more than a stroll for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A sea like this is nothing more than a stroll for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-if you say so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-if you say so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-if you say so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong with you? Why're you shaking like a leaf?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong with you? Why're you shaking like a leaf?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong with you? Why're you shaking like a leaf?

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-u-uh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-u-uh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-u-uh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-M-MOMMMMM?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-M-MOMMMMM?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-M-MOMMMMM?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, it's "Mother," not "Mom."
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, it's "Mother," not "Mom."
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, it's "Mother," not "Mom."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I raise you to speak so sloppily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I raise you to speak so sloppily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I raise you to speak so sloppily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That elegant lady is Tallie's mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That elegant lady is Tallie's mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That elegant lady is Tallie's mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The commander of the Eastern Coast Guard's wife.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The commander of the Eastern Coast Guard's wife.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The commander of the Eastern Coast Guard's wife.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One of the great magnates of Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One of the great magnates of Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One of the great magnates of Front Bay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the mother of the troublemaking Crew triplets?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the mother of the troublemaking Crew triplets?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the mother of the troublemaking Crew triplets?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh dear, that last part stings a little.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh dear, that last part stings a little.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh dear, that last part stings a little.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since fate brought us together, allow me to introduce myself properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since fate brought us together, allow me to introduce myself properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since fate brought us together, allow me to introduce myself properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Mary Crew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Mary Crew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Mary Crew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wife of the commander who protects the Eastern Coast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wife of the commander who protects the Eastern Coast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wife of the commander who protects the Eastern Coast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Matriarch of the Crew family, one of Front Bay's great houses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Matriarch of the Crew family, one of Front Bay's great houses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Matriarch of the Crew family, one of Front Bay's great houses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the mother of the beloved Crew sisters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's probably yelling something like "thank you" or whatever.

root.m_Talk_FRA: She's probably yelling something like "thank you" or whatever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera's really angry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said she'll sink the ship the moment they arrive!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why is she here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-aaah! Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-aaah! Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-aaah! Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who fired that cannon at my face, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough!* N-no...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, look! A ship!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, look! A ship!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, look! A ship!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that the group we saw earlier cutting off a Kraken tentacle?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that the group we saw earlier cutting off a Kraken tentacle?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that the group we saw earlier cutting off a Kraken tentacle?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So please let me go!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So please let me go!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So please let me go!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, so annoying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, so annoying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, so annoying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Count yourself lucky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Count yourself lucky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Count yourself lucky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! A real pirate doesn't bow down to threats!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! A real pirate doesn't bow down to threats!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! A real pirate doesn't bow down to threats!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you little...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you little...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tallie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tallie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tallie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this voice...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this voice...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this voice...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We shouldn't be fighting among ourselves in a situation like this, should we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We shouldn't be fighting among ourselves in a situation like this, should we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We shouldn't be fighting among ourselves in a situation like this, should we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How are you here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How are you here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How are you here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Auntie Mary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Auntie Mary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Auntie Mary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, yes. Mary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, yes. Mary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, yes. Mary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That name feels familiar to me now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That name feels familiar to me now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That name feels familiar to me now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, Kiera.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, Kiera.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, Kiera.

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-how... have you been all this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-how... have you been all this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-how... have you been all this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the whole world in turmoil, did you think I'd just lie around quietly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the whole world in turmoil, did you think I'd just lie around quietly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the whole world in turmoil, did you think I'd just lie around quietly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you hurt anywhere?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you hurt anywhere?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you hurt anywhere?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I may be weaker than before, but I'm still the one who trained you as a child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I may be weaker than before, but I'm still the one who trained you as a child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I may be weaker than before, but I'm still the one who trained you as a child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A sea like this is nothing more than a stroll for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A sea like this is nothing more than a stroll for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A sea like this is nothing more than a stroll for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-if you say so...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-if you say so...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-if you say so...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong with you? Why're you shaking like a leaf?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong with you? Why're you shaking like a leaf?

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-u-uh...

root.m_Talk_FRA: U-u-uh...

root.m_Talk_DEU: M-M-MOMMMMM?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-M-MOMMMMM?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, it's "Mother," not "Mom."
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, it's "Mother," not "Mom."
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, it's "Mother," not "Mom."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I raise you to speak so sloppily?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eeek!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eeek!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eeek!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That elegant lady is Tallie's mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That elegant lady is Tallie's mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That elegant lady is Tallie's mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The commander of the Eastern Coast Guard's wife.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The commander of the Eastern Coast Guard's wife.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The commander of the Eastern Coast Guard's wife.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One of the great magnates of Front Bay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One of the great magnates of Front Bay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One of the great magnates of Front Bay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the mother of the troublemaking Crew triplets?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the mother of the troublemaking Crew triplets?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the mother of the troublemaking Crew triplets?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh dear, that last part stings a little.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh dear, that last part stings a little.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh dear, that last part stings a little.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since fate brought us together, allow me to introduce myself properly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since fate brought us together, allow me to introduce myself properly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since fate brought us together, allow me to introduce myself properly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Mary Crew.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Mary Crew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wife of the commander who protects the Eastern Coast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wife of the commander who protects the Eastern Coast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wife of the commander who protects the Eastern Coast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Matriarch of the Crew family, one of Front Bay's great houses.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Matriarch of the Crew family, one of Front Bay's great houses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the mother of the beloved Crew sisters.
